logs.content: after deploy and navigating the app why my cart page doesn't show the checkoutform fields?
Investigated the issue - found that cart was showing as empty even after adding items, suggesting a problem with cart state management
Fixed: Each component creating its own cart instance -> Implemented CartContext with React Context API for shared state

details.issue: Cart state not shared between components
details.solution: Created CartContext with useReducer for centralized state management

logs.content: Created src/context/CartContext.tsx: Centralized cart state management with React Context API

details.purpose: Provide shared cart state across all components

logs.content: Edited App.tsx: Wrapped app with CartProvider to make cart context available throughout app
Updated all components to use shared CartContext instead of local useCart hook

details.change: Updated imports from useCart hook to CartContext

logs.content: yes now it works great with the whatsapp send message functionality

details.status: Checkout form working, WhatsApp integration functional

logs.content: can you do a log save this time since i don't have time to practice manual log method you showed me
